agent_session_executor_shape_check.name: agent_session_executor_shape_check
agent_session_executor_shape_check.value:
(
        "agent_session"."executor_kind" = 'athena'
        AND "agent_session"."owner_user_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "agent_session"."agent_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "agent_session"."executor_kind" = 'registered_agent'
        AND "agent_session"."owner_user_id" IS NULL
        AND "agent_session"."context_organization_id" IS NULL
        AND "agent_session"."organization_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "agent_session"."agent_id" IS NOT NULL
      )

agent_session_run_attribution_check.name: agent_session_run_attribution_check
agent_session_run_attribution_check.value: "agent_session_run"."owner_user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "agent_session_run"."organization_id" IS NOT NULL

agent_session_transcript_attribution_che.name: agent_session_transcript_attribution_check
agent_session_transcript_attribution_che.value: "agent_session_transcript"."owner_user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "agent_session_transcript"."organization_id" IS NOT NULL

columns.expression:
(
        setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce("title", '')), 'A') ||
        setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce("summary", '')), 'B') ||
        setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce("body", '')), 'C')
      )

time_interval_one_active_human_per_hub_u.name: time_interval_one_active_human_per_hub_uq
time_interval_one_active_human_per_hub_u.where: "time_interval"."mode" = 'human_active' AND "time_interval"."ended_at" IS NULL AND "time_interval"."superseded_by_id" IS NULL
